title: Add 5-second loading state with optimization messages after device name entry

requirements.summary: Add a 5-second loading state with sequential optimization messages before showing the sensitivity popup
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the Generate button triggers a 5-second loading state before showing the sensitivity popup
The loading state displays the message 'optimising your device'
The loading state displays the message 'generating sensitivity for your device'
After 5 seconds, the loading state disappears and the sensitivity popup appears with randomly generated Brazilian sensitivity values
The Generate button is disabled or shows a loading indicator during the 5-second delay

file_operations.description: Add loading state management with a 5-second delay and sequential message display ('optimising your device' and 'generating sensitivity for your device'). Update the Generate button click handler to trigger the loading state, disable the button during loading, and show the sensitivity popup only after the delay completes. Preserve the existing white input box styling and random sensitivity value generation logic.
